'''Timora''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Timora system/Legends|Timora system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Timora was the inner endpoint of the [[Shiritoku Way]] and the closest planet to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. Its people exported [[sunpetal]]s. It also served as a shipping point for [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] products from Bakura.

{{Planet-stub}}
